visits.note: Patient P080 presents with 2 weeks of worsening fatigue and increased thirst. Physical examination reveals a blood pressure of 140/90. HbA1c is elevated at 8.1. The patient has a history of hypertension and hyperlipidemia. Plan: Initiate metformin 500mg BID and atorvastatin 20mg daily.

Patient P080 returns 8 months after initial visit with worsening blood pressure and decreased eGFR. Physical examination reveals a blood pressure of 152/98. HbA1c has decreased to 7.2. The patient reports new onset of lower extremity edema. Plan: Increase metformin to 1000mg BID and initiate losartan 50mg daily.

Patient P080 returns 8 months after previous visit with continued worsening renal function. Physical examination reveals a blood pressure of 158/102. HbA1c has decreased to 6.8. The patient reports new onset of shortness of breath. Plan: Increase losartan to 100mg daily and initiate furosemide 40mg daily.
